title: Velvet Home + Living: Discover the heart of home style in the Garden Route
description: BUSINESS NEWS - For more than 20 years, our...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - For more than 20 years, our family-owned furniture store has been proud to call George home. Nestled in the heart of the Garden Route, we’ve grown alongside our town - not just as a business, but as a trusted part of the community. Many of our customers have become friends over the years, returning time and again as they furnish new homes, renovate old ones, or simply look for that perfect piece to complete a room.


> Our philosophy is simple: beautiful furniture should feel luxurious, last for years, and still be accessible.


That’s why we focus on sourcing high-quality, upmarket pieces that are both affordable and timeless.

Whether you’re drawn to classic styles or clean contemporary lines, you’ll find something in our showroom that feels just right - without long waiting times or inflated prices.

One of the things we’re best known for is our curated collection of reclaimed wooden furniture - rich in texture, full of history and always full of soul.

We travel internationally to hand-pick each piece and work closely with artisans and workshops that understand our commitment to quality and craftsmanship.

Another point of pride? Everything you see on our floor is available immediately. In a world of back orders and delays, that’s something our customers deeply appreciate - especially those who are new to the area and just getting settled.

As a local business, we understand the people we serve. That’s why service is at the heart of everything we do. Our team is small, experienced and passionate - and we take the time to listen, guide and help you make the right choice for your space.

Being nominated for the Best of George is a true honour, and it’s a reflection of the support we’ve received from our incredible customers - both long-standing and brand-new. Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

If you haven’t discovered us yet, we invite you to visit and see why so many people say there’s just something different and special about shopping with us.

Your home deserves the best. And so do you.

Photo supplied.

George showroom.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
